_publications._publicationTitle: Effect of Mind-Body Skills Training on Quality of Life for Geographically Diverse Adults With Neurofibromatosis: A Fully Remote Randomized Clinical Trial.

_contextSnippet: Improvements in both outcomes remained at 12 months after baseline in both groups, but the size of improvement decreased for those in the HEP-NF group and were sustained for those in the 3RP-NF group.
details: HEP-NF showed improvements that decreased over time, with effect sizes diminishing by 12 months compared to 3RP-NF
